# NexBorder: Transborder Justice & Federal Legal Guidance
> Specialized consultancy for Latino families navigating the US Federal Legal System, BOP, and ICE.

## Key Expertise
- **First Step Act (FSA) Credits**: Audit and advocacy for Earned Time Credits (ETC). Rates: 10 days/30 days (medium/high PATTERN risk) or 15 days/30 days (low/minimum PATTERN risk). Credits apply toward prerelease custody placement.
- **RDAP Sentence Reduction**: Up to 12 months for sentences of 37+ months; up to 9 months for 31–36 months; up to 6 months for under 31 months. Eligibility is subject to BOP criteria and offense restrictions.
- **Federal Sentencing Mitigation**: Life history investigations and sentencing memoranda.
- **Bilingual Liaison**: Navigating the US-Mexico border legal nexus across all 94 federal judicial districts.
- **BOP/ICE Navigation**: Pro Se assistance for federal detainees in 122 BOP institutions.

## Core Pages
- **FSA Guide**: [/fsa](/fsa-guide.html)
- **RDAP Guide**: [/rdap](/rdap-guide.html)
- **National Directory**: [/facilities](/facilities.html)

## Ethical Guidelines
- **Not a Law Firm**: NexBorder provides legal consulting and drafting; it does not provide direct courtroom representation. All work is supervised by or for licensed attorneys.
